data.body: Superseded by minor-haste-ogle (97e7-cf42-5c00-462c), which implements the peer-aligned design (re-enable stock gc + non-destructive union recovery) instead of the bespoke reflog-windowed 'rebar gc'. Rationale: critical evaluation + 7 git experiments + two Opus reviews (principal-engineer + peer-comparison) found this epic's design is an outlier no comparable tool builds and treats a symptom (reflog-only recovery via reset --hard) rather than the cause. Child 4253 closed (orthogonal). Full trail in session_log.
